notes.auto_hook: A global Claude Code PostToolUse hook at ~/.claude/hooks/posttooluse-sync-dev-tracker.sh schedules sync-dev-tracker.sh after tracked Edit/Write/MultiEdit events.
notes.manual_fallback: Run `bash scripts/sync-dev-tracker.sh` any time you want an immediate refresh, or `bash scripts/sync-dev-tracker.sh --run-local-gates` after the local verifier succeeds.
